commit_scope: Add a focused source-originated BML control/backtracking proof for save/discard and try/throw/catch, and retune the native north-star to name the proven floor without entering mutable-local or interface/package lanes.

This band is 3-kernel only because BML source compiler/file-read proof bands are not fourth-arm covered; the next fourth-arm gap is a source-compiler/fkwu admission point, not a control semantic weakening.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: BML native floor evidence now includes a focused source-originated control/backtracking proof: bml-thesis-forward-backward-demo.bml parses, lowers to save/push-int/discard/try, returns 7 through catch, clears snapshots, and replays forward/backward to the empty VM state.

phase_gate.reason: The focused source save/discard and try/throw/catch floor is proven locally. General arbitrary control-block lowering, source-level restore spelling, and fourth-arm admission for this source-compiler band remain explicit gaps.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-control-backtracking-floor-proof.fk reads form-stdlib/tests/fixtures/bml-thesis-forward-backward-demo.bml directly and proves parse completion, state-int and try-throw-return rule selection, save/push-int/discard/try op lowering, return value 7, snapshot cleanup, and DO/UNDO restoration.

docs/coherence-substrate/bml-native-north-star.form moves only focused BMA fail/cut/mark-save-restore-discard, source if_fail/while_success, and source save-discard-try-throw-catch into current-supported while keeping arbitrary control-block lowering and source-restore spelling unsupported.
docs/system_audit/bml_thesis_feature_audit_20260601.md records the new source proof and preserves full arbitrary control-flow lowering as a gap.
3-kernel only: this source-compiler/file-read proof is not listed in form/fourth-arm-bands.txt; fourth-arm admission for BML source compiler proof bands remains the next exact proof point.
